referencePolicy.usage: User-approved visual direction and comparison evidence only.
referencePolicy.runtimeRestriction: No archived reference is a runtime texture, production character asset, card asset, portrait, sprite, animation frame, or canonical asset.
referencePolicy.approvalBoundary: Approval applies to the visual direction. Every future production binary requires separate exact-file approval.
referencePolicy.binaryHandling: Original attachment bytes are preserved. Repository filenames use .jpg because the supplied bytes are JPEG despite the upload names ending in .png.
referencePolicy.rightsNote: The user supplied the references for project direction. Copyright ownership and production-use licensing were not independently verified; retain them as internal reference-only material.

references.provenance: User-supplied and explicitly approved in the Character Art Style Lock & Migration Contract v1 task on 2026-07-19.
approvalRole: overall polished mobile auto-battler rendering language

references.regionDescription: The green female Archer/Ranger shown in the lower shop card and the matching small green archer on the board. No crop or derivative was created.
